mainEntity.name: Which entity type is best for my business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pvt Ltd for funding, LLP for professionals, OPC for solo entrepreneurs, Section 8 for non-profit. We advise based on your specific goals.

mainEntity.name: What is the cheapest company to register?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sole proprietorship (₹0 registration fee) or LLP (from ₹5,999). Pvt Ltd from ₹8,999 all-inclusive.

mainEntity.name: Can NRIs register a company in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. NRIs can be directors and shareholders. At least one director must be an Indian resident (182+ days in India).

mainEntity.name: Do you provide company registration in Gurugram?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Gurugram, Haryana. Millennium City — India's top corporate hub. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

mainEntity.name: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Gurugram?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Gurugram clients.

mainEntity.name: How do I get started with company registration in Gurugram?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Gurugram businesses with no location surcharges.
